commands.description: Registered commands: { id, title, subtitle?, group?, keywords?, icon?, shortcut?, onSelect, disabled?, danger? }

onOpenChange.description: Called when the palette opens or closes

hotkey.description: Global hotkey to toggle the palette ('mod' = Cmd on Mac, Ctrl elsewhere)

emptyMessage.description: Shown when no commands match the query

recents.description: When provided, persists recently selected ids to localStorage

maxResults.description: Maximum number of items to show

filterFn.description: Custom scorer; return 0 to hide. Default: subsequence match on title/keywords/group
